fun plan(workspace: String, repository: String, pullRequestNumber: String?): SecurityVerdict {
    val repoReadme = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/README.md")
    val repoIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/index.md")
    val maintenance = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val generatedIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val principles = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val reviewScope = readWorkflowContext(repository, pullRequestNumber)
    val changedFiles = listChangedFiles(reviewScope)
    val securityRelevantFiles = filterSecurityRelevantFiles(changedFiles)
    val sourceSnapshots = readFiles(securityRelevantFiles)
    val diff = readDiff(reviewScope)
    val dependencyManifests = readMatchingFiles("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem", listOf("**/build.gradle.kts", "**/pom.xml", "**/gradle.lockfile", "**/libs.versions.toml"))
    val securityContext = buildSecurityContext(repoReadme, repoIndex, maintenance, generatedIndex, principles)
    val taintFindings = inspectInputTrustBoundaries(diff, sourceSnapshots, securityContext)
    val authzFindings = inspectAuthnAuthzChanges(diff, sourceSnapshots, securityContext)
    val cryptoFindings = inspectCryptoAndSecretHandling(diff, sourceSnapshots, securityContext)
    val deserializationFindings = inspectParsingAndDeserialization(diff, sourceSnapshots, securityContext)
    val persistenceFindings = inspectPersistenceAndRecoverySecurity(diff, sourceSnapshots, securityContext)
    val dependencyFindings = inspectDependencyRisk(dependencyManifests, diff)
    val concurrencyFindings = inspectSecurityImpactOfConcurrency(diff, sourceSnapshots, securityContext)
    val combinedFindings = combineFindings(taintFindings, authzFindings, cryptoFindings, deserializationFindings, persistenceFindings, dependencyFindings, concurrencyFindings)
    val verdict = judgeSecurityVerdict(combinedFindings, reviewScope)
    val evidence = redactSensitiveEvidence(combinedFindings)
    val report = formatSecurityJudgeReport(verdict, evidence)
    return makeSecurityVerdict(verdict, report)
}
